zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Antingham於1380年出生在英國諾福爾可武德利辛時，她的父親William De Antingham20歲，母親Margarete Brewse20歲。她於1396年與Nicholas Wychingham在英國諾福爾可武德利辛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年在英國諾福爾可諾維其享年79歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Antingham于1380年出生在英国諾福爾可武德利辛时，她的父亲William De Antingham20岁，母亲Margarete Brewse20岁。她于1396年与Nicholas Wychingham在英国諾福爾可武德利辛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年在英国諾福爾可諾維其享年79岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: Antingham

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Antingham was born in 1380, in Woodrising, Norfolk, England, her father, William De Antingham, was 20 and her mother, Margarete Brewse, was 20. She married Nicholas Wychingham in 1396, in Woodrising, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1459, in Norwich, Norfolk, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Antingham est née en 1380, à Woodrising, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William De Antingham, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margarete Brewse, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas Wychingham en 1396, à Woodrising, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1459, à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Antingham 1380 in Woodrising, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William De Antingham 20 und ihre Mutter Margarete Brewse 20. Sie hat 1396 in Woodrising, Norfolk, England Nicholas Wychingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1459 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Norwich, Norfolk, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Antingham è nata il nel 1380 nel Woodrising, Norfolk, England, sua padre, William De Antingham, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Margarete Brewse, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas Wychingham nel 1396, nel Woodrising, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1459, nel Norwich, Norfolk, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolta a Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Antinghamが1380年にイギリスノーフォルクウッドリシングで生まれた時，父William De Antinghamは20歳，母Margarete Brewseは20歳であった。1396年にイギリスノーフォルクウッドリシングでNicholas Wychinghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1459年にイギリスノーフォルクノーウィチで79歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Antingham(이)가 1380년 영국 노르폴크 우드리징에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De Antingham(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarete Brewse(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1396년 영국 노르폴크 우드리징에서 Nicholas Wychingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 노르폴크 노위치에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Antingham nasceu em 1380, em Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William De Antingham, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Margarete Brewse, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Wychingham em 1396, em Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1459, em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Antingham родилась в 1380 г. в местности вудрисинг, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William De Antingham было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarete Brewse, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Wychingham в 1396 г. в местности вудрисинг, норфолк, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1459 г. в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Antingham nació en 1380, en Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William De Antingham, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Margarete Brewse, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Nicholas Wychingham en 1396, en Woodrising, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1459, en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultada en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
